def negative_unsafe_yaml_loader():
    rule_id = "unsafe_yaml_loader"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "yaml.load(...) or full_load(...) style loaders used where safe loading is more appropriate."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
